strengths: Direct experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK) across multiple senior roles, including current position at re:cinq
AI agent infrastructure work — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored D-language test frameworks, organized testing dojos and workshops
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely despite being the designated primary backend framework
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are not explicitly mentioned; testing framework fluency in the required stack is unconfirmed
Java/Kotlin listed in skills but only legacy embedded/robotic-arm context shown — secondary stack depth is thin for production backend services
response.justification: The candidate brings genuine seniority and breadth across the full stack, with current hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent tooling that maps closely to the role's most distinctive requirements. The primary concern is the complete absence of Nest.js, which is the designated backend framework; experience with the required testing toolchain (Vitest, Playwright) is also unconfirmed. These gaps are learnable for a developer of this caliber, but they are real unknowns that warrant direct verification before drawing a conclusion on fit.
